name: Levothyroxine
indications:
## Main indications

Hypothyroidism.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: Myxedema: 200–400 mcg IV loading; PO maintenance.
adulto.administration: Slow IV or PO on empty stomach.

pediatrico.dose: 0 - 3 months: 10-15 µg/kg; 3 - 6 months: 25-50 µg; 6-12 months: 50-75 µg; 1-5 years: 75-100 µg; 6-12 years: 100-150 µg; > 12 years: 150 µg.
pediatrico.notes: Must be prescribed by specialists. Iron salts, aluminum hydroxide, sucralfate decrease its absorption. Levothyroxine increases the effect of oral anticoagulants. Phenytoin may decrease levothyroxine levels. Administer on empty stomach, 1 - 1.5 h before breakfast. Do not administer via nasogastric tube.

stability:
## Stability

- IV use immediately after preparation.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Tachycardia, headaches, cardiac arrhythmias, nervousness, insomnia, alopecia, increased appetite.
